channel.title: FMaInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMaInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump’s ‘gold card’ visas were supposed to solve the $39 trillion national debt. They’ve only sold one
item.description: Gold card revenue "may be earmarked for deficit reduction, but it actually could be more money than that," Trump previously told reporters.

item.title: A Low Credit Score Could Be Adding Thousands of Dollars to Your Insurance Premiums
item.description: States move to curb insurers charging higher premiums based on low credit scores.

item.title: Trump’s Labor Secretary: We’re rewriting the rules on joint employment. Here’s what businesses need to know
item.description: This proposed rule would give employers — and employees — a clearer test for determining when two companies share legal responsibility for the same wo...

item.title: The space economy: how to invest in space and SpaceX
item.description: The space economy is expanding thanks to falling costs and increased private participation. How can you invest in space?
